name: agentic-engineering-max
description: Plan, build, review: a multi-agent engineering toolkit for Claude Code projects. Ships a scientific-method plan interviewer, a 3-department implementation system (PM + worker + reviewer with atomic task claiming), an 8-stance epistemic review panel, and state-surface discipline (auto-written plan-state.md + README mirror + pre-commit + drift hooks).
